title: API Documentation with Swagger
scenario: Generate API documentation for a RESTful API using Swagger. The API should handle user authentication and provide CRUD operations for managing users. The target LLM output should be a Swagger JSON file.
constraints: Must include at least 5 API endpoints
Must use OAuth 2.0 for user authentication

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated Swagger file should include at least 5 API endpoints.
The Swagger file should include OAuth 2.0 integration for user authentication.
The generated Swagger file should be syntactically correct and formatted correctly.
